Az üvegfólia külső része olyan kezelt felülettel rendelkezik, amely megakadályozza, hogy az ujjlenyomatok megtapadjanak rajta. Minoyaki is appreciated for being handmade and hiding centuries-old traditions that inspire local artists. Each piece of dishes is original and its colours are permanent and do not peel off. The design of the spoon is simple, which highlights the material and its quality. It does not contain any metals or other harmful substances. The advantage is the use of a Made in Japan spoon in the dishwasher and in the microwave. items.raw_desc: Adalék Wynn's 70612 ólomhelyettesítő, 250 ml:Wynn's 70612 Lead Substitute, 250 ml is designed to treat all two and four stroke gasoline engines. It is suitable for car engines, motorcycles, LPG engines, yachts, outboard motors, generators, pumps and lawnmowers. It has a double effect. It protects the valve seats and reduces wear when using unleaded petrol and stabilises the fuel in the tank so that it does not lose its properties. It therefore preserves the fuel even when it is stored in the tank for long periods of time during irregular use or when the engine is shut down for long periods of time. Slouží k vyšlehání jemně mletého čajového prášku s horkou vodou do hladké konzistence s jemnou pěnou, která je typická pro správně připravenou matchu. Díky svému tvaru umožňuje rovnoměrné promíchání bez hrudek a pomáhá plně rozvinout chuť i aroma matchy. Metlička je vhodná jak pro každodenní přípravu, tak pro tradiční čajové rituály.
